Home Tasks Leaderboard

Task 3: Into the Blue

Type: Research / Literature Mapping

Goal

Produce a one-page literature scan on a topic from another group.

Brief

Your team receives a narrowly scoped research question from another domain. Use AI research tools, browser-based prompting, or deep research workflows to explore the topic and synthesize the state of the field.

Rules

  • Maximum 1 page
  • Must include references
  • Focus on source-backed claims
  • Clearly separate:
    • What is known
    • What is debated
    • What is uncertain
    • What seems promising

Deliverables

  • PDF one-pager literature scan
  • Reference list
  • "How we did it" documentation

Scoring Criteria

  • Clarity: Is the information presented clearly?
  • Structure: Is the one-pager well organized?
  • Depth: Does it cover the landscape adequately?
  • Correctness: Are claims accurate and source-backed?
  • Source Quality: Are references credible and relevant?

What It Teaches

  • How to scope a question narrowly enough for AI research agents
  • How to ask for source-backed claims, uncertainty, and disagreements
  • How to separate "survey the field" from "answer the question"
  • How to use browser-enabled AI critically

Submission

Submit Literature Scan & Report
